speaker: MATT
raw_text: We're not having a show next week, we're going to be at Comic Con. Yeah, we have a week off. So we'll miss you guys next week, but we do have our Critical Role panel on Saturday at Comic Con, it's at 10:30am in Room 6...

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yep, Apple and Google Play.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes. And those are the ones. Of course we'll have Talks Machina next Tuesday at 7:00pm about this episode tonight, here on Twitch and Alpha, 7:00pm Pacific, with our fantastic host Brian Foster, so you can check that out. Wednesday Club next week for you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Wednesday Club, we're talking about Comic Con, because Comic Con is coming up, and we're going to try and give you a first-timer's guide to Comic Con: If you've never been to one, what to expect, what to do for fun, and all sorts of things that you could see or do in San Diego. Other than us. Thank you, I was very proud of last night.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He looks very closely, and you get sense that part of its nature is scanning through you; it's getting a sense and a read of you as an individual, and it says, "No one you need to worry about." Stands up and then takes two steps back (heavy footfalls) into place and looks straight ahead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Standing a full ten feet taller than you, practically, the wings slightly bent, the large planar entity kneels down. "Hello."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hello. Vacation Scanlan here. Couple questions. By the way, was he one of the ones who fought in there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Do they all look alike? 17 plus one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hard to tell. You didn't pay a lot of attention.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Hey, just wondering, a few questions. A: How does one get out of here? Is there a door to another plane?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I imagine the same way you came in."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A god brought us here. All right, cool. Number two: Are there any other like your Dawnfather around here? Any other gods in the area?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Across Elysium, there are two deities that call it home: the Dawnfather and the Everlight."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So we covered our bases. Out of curiosity What are you called?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Based on when you left, it would still be probably-- well, you were over in Vasselheim, which means it's getting dark, actually. I'd say with the way the sun has passed through the sky now, you've just gotten past dusk. There's still light in the sky, but it's going from oranges to purples to dark blues on the horizon, and you can see hints of firelight, torchlight and candlelight from within the actual city below.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What were the shard things called again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The shard things?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The things we need to collect?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There wasn't really a name for them more than they're small pieces of essence of the deity.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So we need pieces of god.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Does the little seed of light given to my sister look anything like the little seed that Scanlan and Vax saw from riding the shadow creature in the sky?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. In a sense that it's a small source of power of some kind, but what you saw there was maybe about that large on the platform. What she has is bead size.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is it this size? Or this size?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Comparable to each. So you stand outside of Terrah. What are you doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What time of day is it? How tired are we?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Well, some are toxic, some are not, but since the giants moved in and ruptured some of the natural formations, some of them have grown toxic or acidic, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hulking, stupid giants?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Giants? At the pools?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I thought it was something about gnomes there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It was once."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They grew. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is that something you can do, Scanlan?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "They're geothermic large puddles across the mountainside. Various minerals being lifted up from the deep waters beneath the mountain. Heated, bubbling, boiling, steaming. But the giants moved in hundreds of years ago, stomped around, and ended up filling the entire subterranean gnomish city of Wittebak with fumes and poison. Killed most of them, and the rest fled to Kraghammer."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you all ever broach the area or do you just stay clear of it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Best to avoid, we have our own business to deal with. And it's 100 miles from here. It's not much of an issue."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And the pools are naturally poisonous?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Got your shoes back. Keyleth returns with some coffee. The rest of you come to consciousness, and the morning sun is now blaring down over the Cliffkeep. It's a strangely clear sky for the north. While a lot of it is relatively cold usually, you're used to seeing the snow- capped mountaintops-- oh, you found it! There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Dear, every stitch on my body is yours when I am gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't want every stitch. None of it's worth you leaving.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I slide my feet into the shoes and I wiggle my toes around. Oh, I'm sorry. I also have a confession to make.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't exactly have your shoes anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I think that I left them in the Feywild.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The Feywild?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I think I dropped them into a bog. They didn't fit me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You are a motherfucker. You couldn't have just put them in the Bag of Holding?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm still me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Great, wonderful. I like being barefoot.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You have very cute, small feet that fit in the boots that you gave me that did not fit my feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's great.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's probably shoes here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Probably. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I pull out her shoes and I put them down.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, at least there's that!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Essentially, for a few hundred years, you get the sense that the Pools of Wittebak have been a hill giant water park. You can see these large mounds of mud and scrap wood and things that have been built into these large hill giant domiciles onto the side of the mountain not far from the pools. It's become a definite hill giant wandering zone. So do you guys continue over the pools, down towards the nearby forest ridge?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This is a vacation spot. What's that water park nearby?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wet 'N' Wild?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You all take a minute to go back to your physical forms. You glance over, and there it is, standing before you. It's very shaded in this part of the forest. You can see a little bit of what looks to be interior light, very faint.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. We land. I land.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I follow.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And behind a tree, I'm going to take form.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take your form? Okay. So all of you land and follow Vex?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "She's a heinous bitch who got what's coming to her 800 years ago."

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: People die every day. Except me. That's my punishment, child. I live on. I live on with my shame and my intelligence and you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Because of Ioun?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What's your relationship to her?

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: What is anyone's relationship to a god?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Good question.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Some of us are champions. Some of them don't like them. Some of them worship them but don't really get respect. What's yours?

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: All of that and more.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So you're a champion? Are you a champion of Ioun?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You're a champion of Ioun. Of course he's a champion of Ioun.

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: I wouldn't say that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But we might, wouldn't we?

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: Champion of Ioun?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (demonic cackling)

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: Are you going to start calling me Ioun's Champion?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Only if it bothers you, Ioun's Champion!"

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: I like it. Drat, eh? Drat. You tell them what you know of Ioun.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, comes back in a day later. All right, cool. So you're there holding that. Scanlan, where would you be?

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: Fly, you fools!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (yelling) No, Sprigg!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Darin, it was really great having you on. Thanks so much.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whoa, cool!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Whoa, this is a cute house!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I can't see inside of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Moving the top floor off.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's crates of apples!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's a sack of something in the corner! Oh my god, how are we all going to fit in there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sprigg is currently unconscious on the ground there. Percival was there talking. Trinket is off to the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Trinket! Where's the imp?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The imp is not currently visible. Pike would be over on the side here. Keyleth, Vax, where would you guys see yourselves right now? Actually, tell me where you would be. I think that's what I'm trying to ask.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would be right next to Keyleth because I was holding her hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As I chuck you onto the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's all right. It's fine.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, he ducked out of the way, and there's also one figure that you recognize from the Shadowfell earlier. You see one of the ghastly creatures that was darting through the ruins leaping from from rooftop to rooftop. Its skin is grayish and long, its limbs lanky, its fingers curled into claws, and this long tongue dangling from his jaws, it's getting ready to run down the stairs as you charge him, and it goes (growls).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's our next shirt.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Quidd, everyone. Quidd.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Quidd.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Quid pro quo.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so top of the combat round. The surprise round is done, you watch Sprigg fall to the ground, bolts sticking out of the side of the neck, the shoulder, and the body. Unconscious, now beginning to pool blood underneath where he's bleeding out, and you glance around and you see a series of shaded figures in the windows that all dart out of the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Cowards.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Dicks.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, they left. The fight's over, everyone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Percy, you're up first.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Wow, this is a lot that happened. I'm going to click my boots, and I'm going to run up the wall and run upstairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which, for the purposes of this, I will place the upstairs over here. So as you dart up, Percival, you run up the stairway there where the one guy you saw was standing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Is he right there?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You heal 13 hit points. That roll doesn't matter. You hear this echoing song in the back of your head. The second song today you've heard from your childhood. You come to consciousness. You wake up and look around you and you can see him singing to you as this giant horrible necrotic creature is looming right in front of you. You have metal bolts sticking out of your chest and an old sensation you haven't felt in a long time courses through your body, which is the need to survive.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I am going to, bonus action-- down here, success, one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Actually, before he even does that, what are you doing on your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to heal him first.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That roll wouldn't matter because he may heal you before you come up. Don't worry about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll bonus action Healing Word him, 2nd-level. I will sing to him. I'll do a little line dance right in front of him and I'll say: (singing) I'll heal your heart, your achy breaky heart. I just don't think you'll understand. That if I heal your heart, your achy breaky heart, you got to wake up and kill a man!

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Ooh!

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: (singing) If only you had used Mage Hand!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Nice!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So how much does he heal?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Seven plus six. 13.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: This guy back here is going to go ahead and since you're the one who has his friend writhing on the ground, is going to go ahead and try to shoot you with his crossbow. You do see him, although he's unaware of that, so he thinks it's a sneak attack shot. That is a 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Super disadvantage. Is that in the book?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's in the new campaign guide. Super disadvantage. Only when you're stuck under a tree on fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure, I'll do all three. All right. Eight, 12, 12. I made him roll super disadvantage. What does this remind me of? Like a terrible old sci-fi movie where the bad guy's on the ground with the gun trying to aim it at the hero with his final shot and the hero just walks up and steps on the gun. You (whoosh) sidestep the bolt as it fires. Nothing on you.

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The crossbow drops, (grunting).

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: Knock knock.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (crying) On fire. All righty, that ends his turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) Comedy comes in threes.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Great. I'll look forward to having you back in a couple weeks, then.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow, Matt. Wow, Darin!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can everybody watching still at home give a round of applause for Darin?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Seriously. If you're available, you may want to, if you can, come and join us for the first half maybe. Not next week, but the week after Comic Con, if you're interested. Because I want to roleplay out you meeting Ioun.

preceding_turns.speaker: DARIN
preceding_turns.text: It would be an honor. You know how important this is to me.
